Jagged Chokidai Spine  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 9
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +4
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35

Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Light:Tiny Glowing Skull
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:5 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:24
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 23:53:44
Page Updated:Tue May 5th, 2009

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 800pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 35
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
a Chokidai Fleshripper
a Chokidai Rootdigger
a Chokidai Wardog

Halls of Betrayal (Chardok B)
NPC Name
a ferocious chokidai
a savage chokidai
a vicious chokidai

Chardok

drops

# Aug 23 2004 at 5:11 PM Rating: Decent

23 posts
dropped off of a Chokidai Fleshripper, common L49 spawn - actually was the PH for iksar betrayer, which has still yet to pop for me
▲ Page top
I got a great price
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2003 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784418263
View User Forum
30 posts
im on rallos zek and the average price for this thing is 90pp i just got lucky and got it in the bazaar for 30pp my lvl 12 rogue (not twinked at all) will love this item. Piercing for 14-19 and backstabing for 51 at lvl 12 owns compared to my newbie quest wep. 6/21
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2002 at 5:19 PM, Rating: Unrated, (Expand Post) I Hate my rogue
alt weapon?
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2002 at 1:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254419922
285 posts
heh.. they arent much to look at heh but my rogue sure likes em lol.. this and even though he cant use it yet heh cause hes lvl 7 his 9-19 piercing dagger should work pretty well together for awhile =)heh.. took about 20min for this thing to drop.. nothin special about it... good for alts or to give to newbs =P good luck all
taygarr
wiz of the 55th season
the seventh hammer
▲ Page top
free
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 2:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758292659
2 posts
First time in Char and this dropped and a tribal war boots in the matter of 30min. Both random mobs. Since boots arnt druid usable i gave them to the shammy in the group, but no one wanted the sword. I gave it to a noob in Qeynos. love your noobs people. Most of the gear in this game is useful at high lvls anyways. what the heck is a 45+ person gunna do with this sword.
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 8:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763140376
182 posts
These can drop off any dog in Chardok, aren't very common, but since Chardok is so camped, they drop a lot. Sometimes people won't even roll on them and just let the person that loots them keep em. I usually sell them for 50pp. Anyone asking more than 250 pp is really ripping you off. Maybe on the new servers it's rarer *shrug*
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2002 at 3:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774496146
1 post
I think i must have struck lucky, i bought it for 87pp off the merchant in the Bazaar stables on Luclin.
▲ Page top
pricing
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 9:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769308167
View User Forum
5 posts
I use this item in my secondary slot. I recently purchased this for 250pp on the zeb server....
*shrug I guess prices will always vary
▲ Page top
Price off?
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 1:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763660706
61 posts
Ok, this can't be right. This price has got to be an old one. 1.3k for this thing? Sure, it's not too bad of a weapon, piercer that goes in the secondary slot, and has a nice little dex boost, but 1.3k? Am I the only one that see's something wrong with this?
▲ Page top
RE: Price off?
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 3:14 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591750012638
View User Forum
Sage
137 posts
Well, thats the average price from all data entered. If you hit the 'pricing data' link you will see that the last two entries aren't very new and even those price this item with 200pp and 300pp. So 1300pp is way out of time.
▲ Page top
RE: Price off?
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2001 at 9:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
I did a pc on this on Rodcet Nife, on October 25, 2001, and the replies seemed to average around the 800pp range, so on my server 1.3k is high. But 200-300 seems real low, since that's what a crystal grinder goes for, and this has a better ratio, and has 4 dex, which IMO is worth more than 2ac, to a rogue.
▲ Page top
dagger
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2001 at 4:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250254904
3 posts
Somebody walked up to me andgave me one of these. I am using it as my primary. I like it very much.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 09 2001 at 3:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) So does this just look like another ordinary ole daggar?...and lol where do these peeps honestly get their "pricing data" at?? What These Drop Off
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 9:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
They're a rare drop off any chokidai MOB in the zone. Within a 12 hour period of fighting there, I got one, so they're about as rare as Sarnak Battle Shields, for example.

man! i had one when i was a newb and i died and didn't go get my corpse!
just a note to all newbs and people giving to newbs, TELL THEM TO GET THERE CORPSES BACK
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 14 2001 at 8:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Idiot
RE: twinking
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 6:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757766651
11 posts
ROFL you aren't twinking enough then. Get a schitte-load of HP items (rings, earrings, etc et) and you won't have to worry about that at all. Hell, if I start some twink they usually have at least 200hp if not more at lvl 1. Never died and lost gear doing that, and how could you? With 200-ish AC and 200-ish HP with a Regen tunic how the frick could you die at that level? :)
▲ Page top
RE: twinking
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 1:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774425180
81 posts
'ROFL'?? maybe not everyone can afford a regen tunic and enough hp/ac jewelry to keep from dying. shi* happens... even with that stuff you could get jumped by a mob that hits harder than you can take. if someone is twinking with this item (although its not a bad item), they probably arent big twinkers.

I twink my toons... I twinked out my rogue at level 1 had over 400hp and over 350 AC... why wait til 6 when you can do it right at level 1 and not die :)
